name: hackathon-plugins
description: Skill pack for a restricted-stack hackathon: React + Node/Go + SQLite, built into one nginx-fronted Docker image for judging.

plugins.name: hackathon-skills
plugins.description: Ten guided skills that take a non-technical team from an empty laptop to a judge-ready single Docker image: bootstrap, feature building, preview, bugfix, DB changes, nginx image build, proxy push, code zip for manual upload, submission check, and plain-language explainer.
